transcription.text: He is the life of parties he has never attended. If he were to punch you in the face, you would have to fight off the strong urge to thank him. Sharks have a week dedicated to him. He is the most interesting man in the world. I don't always drink beer, but when I do, I prefer Dos Equis. Stay safe.

segments.text: He is the life of parties he has never attended.

you would have to fight off the strong urge to thank him.

He is the most interesting man in the world.
I don't always drink beer, but when I do, I prefer Dos Equis.

metadata.title: 2006 Cerveza Dos Equis The Most Interesting Man in the World
